title: AI errors in US murder case lead to discipline for Georgia prosecutor
description: WASHINGTON, May 5 (Reuters) - The ⁠Georgia Supreme Court on Tuesday disciplined a prosecutor in the U.S. state, finding her misuse ⁠of artificial intelligence tools led to fake and misleading case citations appearing in a ‌murder case ruling.

title: Foreign Secy Misri holds talks with Japan's Economic Security Minister; agrees to deepen ties for resilient supply chains
description: Foreign Secretary Vikram Misri on Tuesday held discussions with Japan's Minister in charge of Economic Security and Minister of State for Artificial Intelligence Strategy Kimi Onoda, during which both sides reaffirmed the importance of the India-Japan Special Strategic and Global Partnership.

title: Alphabet closes in on Nvidia's spot as world's biggest company
description: May 5 (Reuters) - Alphabet is on the ⁠cusp of overtaking Nvidia as the world's most valuable company, riding on a record stock rally fueled by its ⁠artificial intelligence efforts and booming cloud business.
content:

title: JU Business School organizes workshop on AI & Agentic Systems
description: Excelsior Correspondent JAMMU, May 5: The Business School, University of Jammu, organised a workshop on “AI & Agentic Systems in Business” in collaboration with Gurcademy, aimed at familiarising students with emerging advancements in artificial intelligence and its applications in business decision-making. The workshop brought together experts and participants to deliberate on the growing significance of AI-driven systems in transforming modern business practices. Speaking on the occasion, Prof Amisha Gupta, Director of The Business School, emphasised the importance of equipping students […]

title: Apple US$250M settlement over AI Siri claims
description: Apple on Tuesday agreed to pay US$250 million to settle a class action lawsuit accusing it of misleading millions of iPhone buyers by falsely touting artificial intelligence capabilities for its Siri voice assistant in late 2024.
